title: paspalum dactylon
intro: Paspalum dactylon, commonly known as Bahia grass or Buffalo grass, is a perennial grass native to tropical and subtropical regions. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Paspalum dactylon include its ability to aid in the treatment of various conditions, such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce blood sugar levels and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of Paspalum dactylon include decoctions and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
